response.justification: Bogdan has approximately 17 years of broad software engineering experience that technically clears the tenure bar, and his current role at re:cinq includes hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work. However, the role is a director-level IC position requiring recognized AI expertise, strategic customer and partner advisory experience, and cloud platform strategy acumen — none of which are evidenced at the required depth or seniority. His career arc is that of a strong and technically diverse individual contributor, not an AI strategy leader operating at executive altitude.
strengths: 17+ years of multi-domain engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure demonstrates genuine technical breadth
Current work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators shows timely and practical engagement with agentic AI workflows
Founder of GISCollective and a history of community talks and workshops indicates an ability to build independently and share technical insights publicly
concerns: No evidence of director-level leadership, strategic advisory relationships, or collaboration with executive or C-suite stakeholders
AI expertise is very recent (approximately one year) and remains tooling-focused rather than reflecting deep AI/ML product strategy or platform-level thought leadership
No advanced degree in an AI-related field and no demonstrated track record as a recognized AI expert with shipped AI-powered products at scale

key_factors.factor: Years of experience and entrepreneurial background
